overrides.expect: t (x) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text {if x = 0} \\ 1 / n & \text {if x = m/n\in\mathbf {Q} \setminus\{0\} is in lowest terms with n > 0} \\ 0 & \text {if x\notin\mathbf {Q}}. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: F ^ {\prime} (x) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} (3 / 2) \sqrt {x} \sin (1 / x) - (1 / \sqrt {x}) \cos (1 / x) & \text {if x\neq 0} \\ 0 & \text {if x = 0.} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: F ^ {\prime} (x) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} (3 / 2) \sqrt {x} \sin (1 / x) - (1 / \sqrt {x}) \cos (1 / x) & \text {if } x\neq 0 \\ 0 & \text {if } x = 0. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: A B = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \text {as given} & \text {if A\geq O and B\geq O} \\ - [ A (- B) ] & \text {if A\geq O and B <   O} \\ - [ (- A) B ] & \text {if A <   O and B\geq O} \\ (- A) (- B) & \text {if A <   O and B <   O}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: A B = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \text {as given} & \text {if } A\geq O \text{ and } B\geq O \\ - [ A (- B) ] & \text {if } A\geq O \text{ and } B < O \\ - [ (- A) B ] & \text {if } A < O \text{ and } B\geq O \\ (- A) (- B) & \text {if } A < O \text{ and } B < O. \end{array} \right.
